meta.title: Christian Noukimi | Full Stack & DevOps Developer

hero.bio: Master's degree in Information Systems Architecture, passionate about software development and DevOps. Based in France, currently looking for a permanent or fixed-term position in full stack development, DevOps or DevSecOps.

footer.builtWith: Built with React, Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion

goals.title: Professional Goals
goals.text: I'm currently looking for a permanent or fixed-term position in full stack development, DevOps or DevSecOps. My goal is to actively contribute to designing and securing infrastructures while strengthening my technical and regulatory expertise.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: Discover my journey in full stack development, DevOps and DevSecOps

items.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Development and integration of REST APIs for collecting, processing and distributing air quality data, documented via Swagger (OpenAPI)
Design of web interfaces and interactive dashboards (air quality indicators, pollutants, AQI indices)
Development of an automated module generating regulatory air quality reports in PDF format
Management of measurement stations, pollution episodes, alerts and environmental reports
Docker containerization (dev and prod) for reproducible deployments
Agile (Scrum) collaboration with technical teams and scientific experts

items.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Complete design of the functional architecture and UX/UI (web and mobile) with Adobe XD
React frontend development faithful to the mockups, integrated with the backend API
REST API development: user management (JWT authentication, roles) and course management
Interactive API documentation with Swagger (OpenAPI)
Unit test writing and application deployment on a VPS

items.title: Full Stack Python Developer
description: Full stack web application development with Python / Django
Design and integration of REST APIs (authentication, user management, business endpoints)
Application security: SQL injection protection, input validation, session management
Containerization and deployment of multi-service applications with Docker
Participation in security audits and technical report writing

items.title: Full Stack Python Development Trainer (Fixed-term)
description: Delivered Full Stack training covering Python, Django, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap and React.js
Mentored students on complete web projects, from requirements analysis to deployment
Taught best practices: software architecture, OOP, code structuring, error handling
Supported learners in using Git and GitHub for collaborative version control

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: An overview of my technical skills in full stack development, DevOps and DevSecOps
skills.learningHighlight: Advanced Kubernetes | AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner | AI & DevOps

skills.description: Cloud computing (AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner - in progress)
SQLi protection, input validation, session management

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover my most significant projects in full stack development and DevSecOps

items.title: CampusConnects
items.longDescription: Complete design and development of a university management platform: functional architecture and UX/UI on Adobe XD, React frontend faithful to the mockups, backend REST API (JWT authentication, roles, course management) documented with Swagger, unit tests and deployment on a VPS.
details: Functional architecture and UX/UI mockups (Adobe XD)
Unit tests and deployment on a VPS

items.title: DevSecOps | Automated Application Security
items.description: Secure CI/CD pipeline with SAST, SCA and DAST
items.longDescription: Design and implementation of a secure DevSecOps CI/CD pipeline on GitHub Actions, automatically integrating security checks on every commit and pull request: static analysis, dependency analysis and dynamic testing, with automatic generation and publication of security reports.
details: SonarQube (SAST) with a blocking Quality Gate
Trivy (SCA) for dependency and Docker image analysis
OWASP ZAP (DAST) headless scans simulating attacks on the deployed app
Automatic generation and publication of security reports in CI/CD
Analysis, prioritization and remediation of detected vulnerabilities

items.title: TV Show App (TMDB API)
items.description: Search and discover TV shows via the TMDB API
items.longDescription: React web application for searching, browsing and discovering TV shows using The Movie Database (TMDB) API: posters, synopsis, cast, ratings, seasons, episodes and recommendations, with advanced sorting and filtering.
details: Integration of the TMDB REST API
Responsive interface with React Hooks and state management
Sorting and filtering by popularity, genre, release date and rating
Automated deployment with continuous integration via GitHub
